items.name: Mandate
items.detail: Derived faction stat: q_s = 0.5*L+0.5*PS; W_s = base(Type)+Prosperity+FacilityTier; T = Σ W_s·(q_s/7); Mandate = clamp(round(7T/(T+6)),0,7) — saturating per Lesson-5 bound. Range 0-7.
items.notes: F1 guard: write-protected, derives only. Cross-module output from settlement_layer. Loop with settlement_layer (Mandate↔L/PS feedback, line 562-563, damper coefficient 0.6/season).

items.name: Prosperity / Defense / Order
items.detail: Three settlement stats, 0-5 per settlement, writable: true, track bucket. Canonical settlement_layer_v30 §1.3.
items.notes: Three distinct stats embedded in one contracted name. Gate g_ord0 triggers on Order=0; g_def0 on Defense=0.

items.name: Local Economy / Garrison Strength / Public Order
items.detail: Three derived values: Local Economy = Prosperity×50; Garrison Strength = Defense×20 + Fort×30; Public Order = Order×20 (riots below 0). All writable: false.
items.notes: Three separate derived values with three separate formulas. Gate g_dv0 'derived value = 0 held through Accounting → stat -1' but doesn't specify which three or if all three must be 0.

items.name: conviction scars
items.detail: Per-Conviction scar count, indelible; writable: true, clock bucket. conviction_track_v1 §2 canonical.
key_bindings_seen: state.scar_acquired (required payload: npc_id, conviction, scar_count_before/after, triggering_event_key)
items.notes: §1 taxonomy SUPERSEDED by conviction_taxonomy_v30 (PP-717) per line 225 note; §2/§3 pending PP-718. THREE-WAY collision: personal conviction_track_v1 system shares name 'Piety Track' with territorial CV system (conviction_track_v30 §1). gap_notes line 240.

items.name: IP (Institutional Pressure)
items.surface: references/module_contracts.yaml:516, gates g_ip100:521, g_ip85:526, g_ip80:531, g_ipfall:536
items.detail: 0-100 clock [PROVISIONAL ED-793]; writable: true, clock bucket. peninsular_strain_v30 §4 generation.
items.notes: [PROVISIONAL ED-793 start value]. Victory gates reference specific thresholds: 100→Phase 1 Occupation, >=85→Phase 2, >=80→Phase 3, <85/<75→stall/abandon per victory_v30 §5.2.

items.name: Health
items.detail: WI*(MW+1)+0.25*Str*End - cumulative_damage, where WI=round(End+4+0.4*Spi). Writable: false, derived_value (F1 guard).
key_bindings_seen: scene.combat_hit stat_deltas route to cumulative_damage substrate (F1 rule)
items.notes: Formula at line 828 references Endurance, Spirit, Strength, Spi (Spirit abbreviation) but these are character attributes NOT defined in personal_combat module's state list. WI and MW undefined as state entries. Export-drift: attributes come from external character model, not internal combat state.

items.name: Legitimacy (L) / Popular Support (PS)
items.detail: Per-settlement tracks, 0-7 range (Jordan ruling 2026-05-30); writable: true, track bucket. §1.8 LPS-2e canonical.
items.notes: Referenced as 'L' and 'PS' in prose, 'L_s' and 'PS_s' in derivation formula (lines 599-600). Abbreviation-vs-full-name SYNONYM split.

items.name: CI (Church Influence)
items.detail: 0-100 territorial clock, writable: true in territorial_piety, writable: false in ci_political. conviction_track_v30 §3 generation.
consumers_seen: victory gates g_ci100, ci_political gates g_ci100/g_cicap
items.notes: TWO-MODULE reference to same quantity: owned by territorial_piety (line 255, writable), read by ci_political (line 644, writable: false). Correctly scoped but potential desynchronization if CI generation and consumption aren't synchronized at accounting boundary.

items.name: cumulative_drift
items.detail: Gate trigger: cumulative_drift > 0.5 → scene.gossip emitted. No state entry declaration.
items.notes: UNREGISTERED: gate references cumulative_drift but it's never declared as a state entry in npc_behavior (line 156-159). Calculation rule unknown. Appears only as gate condition, not in beliefs/opinions or concerns state declarations.

items.name: Fort Level
items.detail: Appears in Garrison Strength formula: Defense × 20 + Fort × 30. Never declared as state entry.
items.notes: UNREGISTERED: defined only in formula at line 591-592, never listed as state entry for any module. Origin module unknown. No gate references it.

items.name: MS (unowned clock read by victory)
items.detail: Unowned clock read by victory module. Gates reference MS=0 (Post-Calamity), MS<=5 (Second Calamity), MS restored to 20 (recovery).
items.notes: UNREGISTERED OWNERSHIP: gap_notes line 671 explicitly — 'MS (unowned clock — no module in contracts)'. Never emitted by any module listed in contracts, only read by victory_v30 §5.1 as a world-state reader.

items.name: WI (Wound Index)
items.detail: Intermediate calculation: WI = round(End+4+0.4*Spi). Used in Health and Wounds formulas but never declared as state entry.
items.notes: UNREGISTERED: defined only in comment at line 820, not as state entry. Intermediate calculation that appears in formulas for Health (line 828: WI*(MW+1)+...) and Wounds (line 821: min(floor(cum/WI), MW+1)).

items.name: MW (Max Wounds)
items.detail: Appears in Wounds formula: min(floor(cum/WI), MW+1). Never declared as state entry. Indirectly in Health formula (line 828: WI*(MW+1)+...).
items.notes: UNREGISTERED: appears in formula at line 821-828 but never declared as state entry or derivation. Origin and calculation rule unknown.

items.name: FacilityTier / base(Type) / W_s (settlement weight)
items.detail: Appear in Mandate formula W_s = base(Type)+Prosperity+FacilityTier; T = Σ W_s·(q_s/7). Never declared as state entries.
items.notes: UNREGISTERED: three quantities appear only in Mandate formula (line 600) as intermediate calculations, never as owned state entries. Origin and calculation rules unknown. base(Type) is a function call notation (unclear what 'Type' refers to — settlement type metadata?).

items.name: Resonant Style
items.detail: Gate g_scar2: 'Resonant Style X exposed; arc transition if X was top primary'. Never declared as state entry.
items.notes: UNREGISTERED: gate g_scar2 (line 231) triggers on Scars=2 but 'Resonant Style exposure' is never defined as a state entry or emission. Related to ED-IN-0025 (resonance_style retirement correction, NEEDS-JORDAN).

findings.claim: Three-way name collision on 'Piety Track': personal conviction scar system (designs/personal/conviction_track_v1.md) and territorial Piety Value/CV system (designs/scene/conviction_track_v30.md) share the same name, creating ambiguity in gap_notes and cross-references.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:225 (piety_track module, 'Piety Track'), :254 (territorial_piety module references 'CV'), gap_notes:240 'NAME COLLISION (3-way)'. Both systems present in module_contracts with different semantics (personal scar vs territory CV).

findings.claim: MS (Morale/Strain) clock is read by victory module but never emitted by any module listed in module_contracts.yaml; gap_notes explicitly flag it as unowned.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:671 gap_notes 'MS (unowned clock — no module in contracts)'. Victory module gates g_ms0:667, g_ms5:673, g_msrec:678 all read MS but victory is state_reader (consumes: []). No module in contracts lists MS in emits:.

findings.claim: Health derivation formula in personal_combat (line 828) references character attributes (Endurance, Spirit, Strength, Spi) that are NOT defined in personal_combat's own state list and are not in any module_contracts entry.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:828 'formula: round(round(End+4+0.4*Spirit) * (min(floor(End/2)+1,3)+1) + 0.25*Strength*Endurance)'. personal_combat state entries (lines 818-824) list Health, cumulative_damage, Wounds, Stamina, Initiative, Poise but NOT Endurance, Spirit, Strength. These must come from a character attribute model outside this contracts file.

findings.claim: cumulative_drift is referenced only in npc_behavior gate g_drift (line 170) but is never declared as a state entry; calculation rule is unknown.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:169-173 gate g_drift 'when: cumulative_drift > 0.5, then: scene.gossip emitted'. npc_behavior state entries (lines 155-159) list beliefs/opinions, concerns, projects, arc state but NOT cumulative_drift. No derivation or formula defines it.

findings.claim: Settlement Mandate derivation formula (line 600) references four quantities not declared as state entries: FacilityTier, base(Type), W_s (settlement weight), and an implicit 'q_s'.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:598-601 derivation 'faction Mandate' formula: 'W_s = base(Type)+Prosperity+FacilityTier; T = Σ W_s·(q_s/7); Mandate = clamp(round(7T/(T+6)),0,7)'. No state entries list FacilityTier, base(Type), or W_s.

findings.claim: personal_combat module says resolver is 'd_sigma' with pool formula 'max(5,History+6)' but 'History' is not in the 9-attribute roster documented in descriptor_registry or key_substrate.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:810 'resolver: d_sigma' with comment 'pool=max(5,History+6)'. CURRENT.md and descriptor_registry.yaml document 9 personal attributes (Agility, Cunning, Spirit, Strength, Endurance, Will, Conviction, Resonance, ?) but History is not listed.

findings.claim: Fort Level appears in settlement Garrison Strength derivation formula (line 591-592) but is never declared as a state entry for any module.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:591-592 derivation 'Garrison Strength' formula: 'Defense × 20 + Fort × 30'. settlement_layer state entries (lines 557-560) list Prosperity/Defense/Order, Local Economy/Garrison/Public Order, Legitimacy/PS, Accord but NOT Fort Level.

findings.claim: Legitimacy/Popular Support are referenced with three name variants in formulas: 'L' and 'PS' in prose, 'L_s' and 'PS_s' in derivation formulas (lines 599-600). Abbreviation-vs-full-name SYNONYM split.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:559 state entry 'Legitimacy (L) / Popular Support (PS)', line 599 derivation input 'L_s', line 600 'q_s = 0.5L+0.5PS'. Same quantities referenced as L/PS and L_s/PS_s.

findings.claim: WI (Wound Index) and MW (Max Wounds) are referenced in personal_combat formulas but are never declared as state entries or derivations.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:819-820 comment 'WI=round(End+4+0.4*Spi)', formula lines 821 'min(floor(cum/WI), MW+1)', line 828 'WI*(MW+1)+0.25*Str*End'. No state entries list WI or MW.

findings.claim: Resonant Style is mentioned in piety_track gate g_scar2 (line 231) as an exposed state ('Resonant Style X exposed') but is never declared as a state entry or emission.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:231 gate g_scar2 'then: Resonant Style X exposed; arc transition if X was top primary'. piety_track state entries (line 225) list only conviction scars, no Resonant Style. Related to ED-IN-0025 (resonance_style retirement correction, NEEDS-JORDAN).

findings.claim: piety_track conviction_track_v1 (line 225) carries note that §1 taxonomy is SUPERSEDED by conviction_taxonomy_v30 (PP-717), yet the module still references that superseded taxonomy in its gap_notes.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:225 note '§1 taxonomy SUPERSEDED by conviction_taxonomy_v30 (PP-717); §2/§3 canonical pending PP-718'. The module documentation may be pointing readers to outdated taxonomy definitions.

findings.claim: CI (Church Influence) is read by ci_political module (writable: false) but owned by territorial_piety module (writable: true). Ownership spans two modules and could desynchronize if accounting phases aren't ordered correctly.
findings.evidence: references/module_contracts.yaml:255 territorial_piety 'CI (Church Influence) writable: true', line 644 ci_political 'CI (Church Influence) writable: false, reads CI for political effects'. Loop/cross-module reference noted.

coverage_notes:
SWEPT SURFACES (complete): references/module_contracts.yaml all 27 modules (lines 1-900), every state/derivations/gates entry, all emits/consumes edges. designs/architecture/key_echo_armature_v1.md §1-§5 (seam contracts, Echo Matrix, registry deltas, conformance binding, fork docket + ruling log). designs/architecture/key_type_registry_v30.md type format §1, all seven families (scene_event, da_outcome, mechanical_event, state_transition, environmental, scene_outcome, system_meta) with payload field requirements. designs/architecture/key_substrate_v30.md §1-§2.5 (Key schema, universal fields, Conviction axis-space).

DELIBERATELY SKIPPED (out of F-CONTRACT scope): params/*.md files (prose tables, F-PARAMS family). sim/ simulation code (oracle verification, F-ORACLE family). designs/scene/combat_engine_v1/ and other subsystem design docs (rich detail but not contracts binding). references/descriptor_registry.yaml (attribute roster, F-DESCRIPTOR family). references/values_master.yaml (stale/wrong, F-VALUES family). Godot .gd and .tres files (port surface, F-GODOT family).

KNOWN-TRACKED OVERLAPS ALREADY CITED (not re-litigated): ED-IN-0008 (descriptor_registry naming), ED-1051 (module_contracts doc:null gaps), ED-1052 (typed engine-params scope), ED-IN-0025 (resonance_style retirement), ED-SC-0008 (social_contest refresh), ED-PC-0003 (sigma band-discipline, ruled in ED-IN-0026 5.12).

HONEST GAPS IN THIS SWEEP: (1) Payload field definitions in key_type_registry §2-§6 were read but not exhaustively cross-checked against module state entries — full matrix (48 types × required_payload_fields) not built (F-PAYLOAD family). (2) No verification that gate conditions are implementable (e.g., g_dv0 'derived value = 0 held through Accounting' — which of three derived values?) — gate-logic audit is F-GATES family. (3) Abbreviation-to-canonical mapping (Spi → Spirit) noted but not systematized. (4) Three modules with doc: null (engine_clock, scene_slate, game_director, scenario_authoring, faction_politics, npc_memory) were extracted from registry but state/derivations/gates are ASSUMPTION-grade — not re-verified against external design docs.
